source_path: 1. Contact360 user and billing and credit system/1.2.99 — Local gateway smoke evidence.md
summary: Local smoke execution for `contact360.io/api` against era `1.2` contract expectations.
flowcharts:
flowchart LR
  contract[Contract]
  service[Service]
  surface[Surface]
  data[Data]
  ops[Ops]
  gate[Release gate]

  contract --> gate
  service --> gate
  surface --> gate
  data --> gate
  ops --> gate

contract.text: Resolve GraphQL contract drift in query examples:
`health.apiMetadata.status` field is not queryable in runtime.
`billing.plans` does not expose `uuid` and `amount` fields as documented in some examples.

service.text: Stabilize request body parsing for POST `/graphql` payload workflows used by smoke scripts.

surface.text: Align dashboard/admin error handling copy for GraphQL field mismatch responses observed during smoke queries.

data.text: Verify whether anonymous `auth.me = null` is expected or should return explicit auth error envelope for client consistency.

ops.text: Add canonical smoke script with URL-encoded GraphQL GET and JSON POST variants.

sections.heading: Focus
sections.prose: Local smoke execution for `contact360.io/api` against era `1.2` contract expectations.
